perspective.title: 3D-fold / perspective / z-composite
perspective.note: Camera-bearing caps isolate the perspective projection (Y/X fold, Z push) vs FCP. Camera-less would be a FALSE FAIL (headless!=GUI); every persp.* cap inserts a real Camera so headless is a valid oracle. Minimized Switch/Smear are node-level real-slug repros.

replicator.title: Replicator / clone-grid
replicator.note: The replicator pinwheel/grid is barely composited (ROADMAP: 'broken single-tile spin on black' vs FCP's full multi-blade replicator). Minimized Clone_Spin/Concentric/Video_Wall are the node-level FCP repros. Caps pack builds a minimal Replicator grid vs FCP.

panels.title: kinetic-panel / gradient / mask
panels.note: Panel layout + image-mask reveal + gradient generator. Minimized Lower/Slide_In are node-level FCP repros. NOTE: Light_Sweep/Up-Over crash headless FCP (SIGSEGV) so those lack a headless oracle — use the minimized cases + caps, not those slugs directly.
